metadata.name: Topan Freeblade Renown 1 — trigger fires once then suppressed by intervening-if
metadata.description: p1 controls Topan Freeblade ({1}{W}, 2/2 Vigilance + Renown 1). On turn 3, Topan Freeblade attacks p2 unblocked and deals 2 combat damage. The Renown 1 trigger fires (CR 702.112a: 'When this creature deals combat damage to a player, if it isn't renowned') with the intervening-if clause checked at trigger time (CR 603.4): Topan Freeblade is not yet renowned, so the ability triggers. It resolves: one +1/+1 counter is placed on Topan Freeblade and it becomes renowned (effective 3/3). On turn 4, Topan Freeblade attacks p2 again unblocked and deals 3 combat damage. The Renown trigger does NOT fire a second time because the intervening-if condition — 'if it isn't renowned' — is false (CR 603.4): Topan Freeblade is already renowned. This script validates the full Renown lifecycle: trigger, resolution, and subsequent non-trigger due to the permanent renowned designation.
metadata.generation_notes: Topan Freeblade oracle text (MCP verified): {1}{W}, Creature — Human Soldier, 2/2. Vigilance (Attacking doesn't cause this creature to tap). Renown 1 (When this creature deals combat damage to a player, if it isn't renowned, put a +1/+1 counter on it and it becomes renowned). Topan Freeblade is NOT in the engine Available Cards list and has no CardDefinition — harness validation will fail for trigger-related assertions until the card is authored. A dispute entry documents this. CR 702.112a: Renown 1 is a triggered ability with an embedded intervening-if clause: 'if it isn't renowned.' Per CR 603.4, the condition is checked both at trigger time and at resolution time. First attack: Topan Freeblade deals 2 combat damage to p2 (power 2, unblocked). Renown trigger fires because 'it isn't renowned' is TRUE at trigger time. Both players pass priority; condition still TRUE at resolution → trigger resolves, one +1/+1 counter placed on Topan Freeblade, it becomes renowned. Effective P/T: 3/3. CR 702.112b: Renowned is a permanent designation; it does not leave with zone changes but persists on the same battlefield object. Second attack: Topan Freeblade (now renowned, 3/3) attacks p2 again unblocked. Deals 3 combat damage (power 3). The Renown trigger does NOT fire — CR 603.4 intervening-if: 'if it isn't renowned' is FALSE (it IS renowned). The trigger simply does not trigger. No stack entry for Renown; no additional counter is placed. CR 702.20a: Vigilance means attacking does not cause Topan Freeblade to tap. Therefore tapped: false throughout both attacks. p2 life: 40 → 38 (after first attack, 2 damage) → 35 (after second attack, 3 damage from now-3/3 creature). The harness does not execute declare_attackers, combat damage, or combat triggers as engine commands, so all combat steps are informational (turn_based_action, trigger_placed). The assert_state after initial setup and the final assert_state reflect harness-visible state only. Dispute entries document the CardDefinition gap and the harness limitation.

disputes.description: Topan Freeblade is not in the engine Available Cards list and has no CardDefinition. Without the CardDefinition, the engine treats Topan Freeblade as a vanilla creature — the Renown triggered ability never fires, no +1/+1 counter is placed, and the creature never becomes renowned. The harness assertions for zones.stack.count: 1 (after Renown triggers) and the counter placement will fail. The script is otherwise CR-correct per oracle text (MCP-verified). Resolution requires authoring a CardDefinition for Topan Freeblade in crates/engine/src/cards/defs/topan_freeblade.rs with Vigilance keyword and a Renown 1 triggered ability.

The harness does not execute declare_attackers, combat damage, or combat-damage-triggered abilities as engine commands (translate_player_action does not map these to any Command). Therefore all combat steps in this script are informational (turn_based_action, trigger_placed, stack_resolve). Expected CR outcomes — p2 life 38 after first attack (2 unblocked combat damage), Renown counter placed, renowned flag set, p2 life 35 after second attack (3 unblocked combat damage from 3/3), no second Renown trigger — are documented in informational steps and generation_notes. The final assert_state reflects initial harness-visible state only (life totals and zone counts unchanged from initial state). This is consistent with scripts 013 and 081 which use the same documentary combat approach.

script.step_note: Turn 3 — FIRST ATTACK. p1 declares Topan Freeblade as attacker targeting p2. Vigilance: Topan Freeblade does not tap (CR 702.20a). p2 has no creatures; Topan Freeblade is unblocked. It deals 2 combat damage to p2 (power 2, CR 510.1b); p2 life 40 → 38. Renown 1 trigger fires: 'if it isn't renowned' is TRUE (CR 603.4 intervening-if). Trigger goes on stack. Both players pass priority. Trigger resolves: one +1/+1 counter placed on Topan Freeblade (effective 3/3); it becomes renowned (CR 702.112a).

actions.description: Initial: Topan Freeblade (2/2 not renowned) untapped on p1 battlefield; p1 at 40 life; p2 at 40 life; stack empty
actions.note: Topan Freeblade has been on the battlefield since before turn 3 — no summoning sickness (CR 302.6). It is not yet renowned (no prior combat damage to a player). Vigilance means it will not tap when declared as an attacker.

actions.description: Declare attackers step: p1 declares Topan Freeblade as attacker targeting p2. Topan Freeblade does NOT tap (Vigilance, CR 702.20a).
actions.note: CR 508.1: p1 declares Topan Freeblade as the attacking creature against p2. CR 508.1a: Topan Freeblade is untapped and has been controlled by p1 continuously since the turn began — no summoning sickness. CR 702.20a: Vigilance — 'Attacking doesn't cause this creature to tap.' Topan Freeblade remains untapped. CR 508.1k: Topan Freeblade becomes an attacking creature.

actions.description: Declare blockers step: p2 controls no creatures and declares no blockers — Topan Freeblade is unblocked
actions.note: CR 509.1: p2 controls no creatures and declares no blockers. Topan Freeblade becomes an unblocked attacker (CR 509.1h).

actions.description: Combat damage step: Topan Freeblade (unblocked, power 2) assigns 2 damage to p2. p2 life: 40 → 38.
actions.note: CR 510.1b: An unblocked creature assigns its combat damage to the player it is attacking. Topan Freeblade (power 2) assigns all 2 damage to p2. CR 510.2: Combat damage is dealt simultaneously. p2 life: 40 → 38.

actions.description: Renown 1 trigger fires: 'When this creature deals combat damage to a player, if it isn't renowned, put a +1/+1 counter on it and it becomes renowned.' (CR 702.112a) Intervening-if checked: Topan Freeblade is NOT yet renowned — condition TRUE (CR 603.4). Trigger fires.
actions.note: CR 702.112a: Renown 1 triggered ability fires when Topan Freeblade deals combat damage to p2. CR 603.4: The intervening-if clause 'if it isn't renowned' is checked at trigger time. Topan Freeblade has not previously dealt combat damage to a player, so it is not renowned — condition is TRUE. The triggered ability fires. CR 510.3a: Abilities that triggered on damage being dealt are put onto the stack before the active player gets priority.

CR 603.3: The Renown triggered ability is placed on the stack the next time a player would receive priority (after combat damage is dealt, per CR 510.3). CR 603.3a: The ability is controlled by p1 (controller of Topan Freeblade when it triggered). The trigger has no targets — it places a counter on its own source.
CR 116.3: Both players pass priority — the Renown 1 triggered ability resolves.

resolution.note: CR 702.112a: Renown 1 resolves — CR 603.4 intervening-if re-checked: Topan Freeblade still is not renowned (nothing changed since the trigger fired). Effect: put 1 +1/+1 counter on Topan Freeblade and it becomes renowned. Topan Freeblade is now effective 3/3 (base 2/2 + one +1/+1 counter). CR 702.112b: Renowned is a permanent designation that persists on the object while it remains on the battlefield.

actions.note: CR 608.2: Renown triggered ability resolves. One +1/+1 counter placed on Topan Freeblade; it becomes renowned. Effective P/T: 3/3. Requires Topan Freeblade CardDefinition for the engine to execute this resolution.

actions.description: Post-first-attack harness state: Topan Freeblade still on p1 battlefield untapped (Vigilance), stack empty. Life totals and hand counts unchanged from harness perspective (combat not executed by harness). CR outcome documented: p2 at 38 life, Topan Freeblade renowned and effective 3/3.
actions.note: Harness does not execute combat or triggers. Expected CR state at this point: Topan Freeblade is renowned and has a +1/+1 counter (3/3). p2 life is 38. Topan Freeblade is untapped (Vigilance, CR 702.20a). See dispute entry for harness limitation details.

script.step_note: Turn 4 — SECOND ATTACK. p1 declares Topan Freeblade (now renowned, effective 3/3) as attacker targeting p2 again. Topan Freeblade does not tap (Vigilance). p2 is unblocked; deals 3 combat damage to p2 (power 3); p2 life 38 → 35. Renown trigger does NOT fire: CR 603.4 intervening-if 'if it isn't renowned' is now FALSE (it IS renowned). No trigger is placed on the stack. This validates the permanent nature of the renowned designation (CR 702.112b) and the intervening-if suppression (CR 603.4).

actions.description: Turn 4 start: Topan Freeblade still on p1 battlefield untapped (Vigilance); stack empty. (Expected CR state: renowned, 3/3 — engine sees initial harness state only.)
actions.note: By this turn, Topan Freeblade is renowned (per the CR-correct outcome of turn 3) and carries one +1/+1 counter (effective 3/3). Vigilance ensures it untapped naturally. No engine-visible change from harness state.

actions.description: Declare attackers step (turn 4): p1 declares Topan Freeblade (renowned, effective 3/3) as attacker targeting p2. Does not tap (Vigilance).
actions.note: CR 508.1: p1 declares Topan Freeblade as attacker. CR 702.20a: Vigilance — Topan Freeblade does not tap. CR 508.1k: Topan Freeblade becomes an attacking creature.

actions.description: Declare blockers step (turn 4): p2 declares no blockers — Topan Freeblade is unblocked
actions.note: CR 509.1: p2 declares no blockers. Topan Freeblade is unblocked (CR 509.1h).

actions.description: Combat damage step (turn 4): Topan Freeblade (unblocked, now power 3 with +1/+1 counter) assigns 3 damage to p2. p2 life: 38 → 35.
actions.note: CR 510.1b: Unblocked creature assigns its combat damage to the defending player. Topan Freeblade has a +1/+1 counter (base power 2 + 1 = 3); it assigns 3 damage to p2. CR 510.2: Combat damage dealt simultaneously. p2 life: 38 → 35.

actions.description: Renown 1 trigger does NOT fire on second attack. CR 603.4 intervening-if 'if it isn't renowned' is FALSE — Topan Freeblade IS renowned. The trigger condition is not met; no triggered ability is placed on the stack.
actions.note: CR 702.112a: Renown 1 reads 'When this creature deals combat damage to a player, if it isn't renowned...' CR 603.4: The intervening-if clause is checked at the time the trigger event occurs. Topan Freeblade IS renowned (became renowned when the trigger resolved in turn 3). Condition 'if it isn't renowned' is FALSE — the ability does NOT trigger. No trigger is placed on the stack. This is the key validation: Renown fires at most once, protected by the intervening-if clause and the permanent renowned designation (CR 702.112b).

actions.description: Final harness state: Topan Freeblade still on p1 battlefield untapped (Vigilance); stack empty. No second Renown trigger was placed on the stack. Life totals unchanged from harness perspective (combat not executed by harness). CR outcome: p2 at 35 life total; Topan Freeblade is renowned and remains a 3/3 with +1/+1 counter.
actions.note: Stack is empty — no second Renown trigger was placed (CR 603.4 intervening-if suppression). CR 702.112b: Renowned persists on Topan Freeblade as long as it remains on the battlefield. Expected CR outcome for second attack: p2 life 35, no Renown trigger, Topan Freeblade still 3/3 renowned. Harness life totals unchanged from initial state (harness does not execute combat). Requires Topan Freeblade CardDefinition for engine-enforced validation of the Renown trigger and renowned designation.
